hindi: जय गणेश गिरिजा सुवन, मंगल मूल सुजान। कहत अयोध्यादास तुम, देहु अभय वरदान॥
english: Victory to Ganesha, son of Girija, source of auspiciousness; Ayodhyadas says, grant me the boon of fearlessness
roman: Jai Ganesh Girija Suvan, Mangal Mool Sujan, Kahat Ayodhyadas Tum, Dehu Abhay Vardan

hindi: जय गिरिजापति दीनदयाला। सदा करत संतन प्रतिपाला॥
english: Victory to Lord of Girija, compassionate to the humble; you always protect and care for the saints
roman: Jai Girijapati Deen Dayala, Sada Karat Santan Pratipala

hindi: भाल चन्द्रमा सोहत नीके। कानन कुण्डल नागफनी के॥
english: The moon shines beautifully on his forehead; serpent-hood earrings adorn his ears
roman: Bhal Chandrama Sohat Nike, Kanan Kundal Nagphanike

hindi: अंग गौर शिर गंग बहाए। मुंडमाल तन क्षार लगाए॥
english: His complexion is fair, Ganga flows from his head; a garland of skulls and sacred ash adorns his body
roman: Ang Gaur Shir Gang Bahaye, Mundmaal Tan Kshar Lagaye

hindi: वस्त्र खाल बाघम्बर सोहे। छवि को देख नाग मन मोहे॥
english: Tiger-skin garments adorn him; even the serpents are enchanted seeing his beauty
roman: Vastra Khal Baghambar Sohe, Chhavi Ko Dekh Naag Man Mohe

hindi: मैना मातु की हवे दुलारी। बाम अंग सोहत छवि न्यारी॥
english: He is the beloved of Mother Maina; Parvati on his left side presents a unique beauty
roman: Maina Matu Ki Have Dulari, Bam Ang Sohat Chhavi Nyari

hindi: कर त्रिशूल सोहत छवि भारी। करत सदा शत्रुन क्षयकारी॥
english: The trident in his hand creates a magnificent vision; ever destroying enemies
roman: Kar Trishul Sohat Chhavi Bhari, Karat Sada Shatrun Kshaykari

hindi: नंदि गणेश सोहैं तहँ कैसे। सागर मध्य कमल हैं जैसे॥
english: Nandi and Ganesha shine beside him; like lotuses in the middle of the ocean
roman: Nandi Ganesh Sohen Tahan Kaise, Sagar Madhya Kamal Hain Jaise

hindi: कार्तिक श्याम और गणराऊ। या छवि को कहि जात न काऊ॥
english: Kartikeya, Shyam and Ganesha; none can fully describe this beauty
roman: Kartik Shyam Aur Ganrau, Ya Chhavi Ko Kahi Jaat Na Kau

hindi: देवन जबहीं जाय पुकारा। तब ही दुख प्रभु आप निवारा॥
english: Whenever the gods went and called upon you; you removed their troubles yourself
roman: Devan Jabhin Jay Pukara, Tab Hi Dukh Prabhu Ap Nivara

hindi: किया उपद्रव तारक भारी। देवन सब मिलि तुमहिं जुहारी॥
english: When demon Taraka wrought great destruction; all the gods bowed to you together
roman: Kiya Upadrav Tarak Bhari, Devan Sab Mili Tumhin Juhari

hindi: तुरत षडानन आप पठायउ। लव निमेष महँ मारि गिरायउ॥
english: You immediately sent Kartikeya (the six-faced one); who slew the demon in an instant
roman: Turat Shadanan Aap Pathayau, Lav Nimesh Mahan Mari Girayau

hindi: आप जलंधर असुर संहारा। सुयश तुम्हार विदित संसारा॥
english: You yourself destroyed the demon Jalandhara; your glory is known throughout the world
roman: Aap Jalandhar Asur Sanhara, Suyash Tumhar Vidit Sansara

hindi: त्रिपुरासुर सन युद्ध मचाई। सबहिं कृपा कर लीन बचाई॥
english: You waged war with the demon Tripurasura; and saved all by your grace
roman: Tripurasur San Yuddh Machai, Sabhin Kripa Kar Leen Bachai

hindi: किया तपहिं भागीरथ भारी। पुरब प्रतिज्ञा तासु पुरारी॥
english: King Bhagirath performed great penance; you Purari fulfilled his ancient vow
roman: Kiya Taphin Bhagirath Bhari, Purab Pratibha Tasu Purari

hindi: दानिन महँ तुम सम कोउ नाहीं। सेवक स्तुति करत सदाहीं॥
english: None among donors equals you; devotees always sing your praises
roman: Danin Mahan Tum Sam Kou Nahin, Sevak Stuti Karat Sadahin

hindi: वेद नाम महिमा तव गाई। अकथ अनादि भेद नहिं पाई॥
english: The Vedas sing the glory of your name; it is indescribable, beginningless, its mystery unfathomed
roman: Ved Naam Mahima Tav Gai, Akath Anadi Bhed Nahin Pai

hindi: प्रकटी उदधि मंथन में ज्वाला। जरत सुरासुर भए बिहाला॥
english: When churning the ocean produced fire; gods and demons were distressed
roman: Prakati Udadhi Manthan Mein Jwala, Jarat Surasur Bhae Bihala

hindi: कीन्ह दया तहँ करी सहाई। नीलकंठ तब नाम कहाई॥
english: You showed mercy and came to help; thus you were named Neelkantha (blue-throated)
roman: Kinh Daya Tahan Kari Sahai, Neelkanth Tab Naam Kahai

hindi: पूजन रामचंद्र जब कीन्हा। जीत के लंका विभीषण दीन्हा॥
english: When Lord Ramachandra worshipped you; he won Lanka and gave it to Vibhishana
roman: Poojan Ramchandra Jab Kinha, Jeet Ke Lanka Vibhishan Dinha

hindi: सहस कमल मे हो रहे धारी। कीन्ह परीक्षा तबहिं पुरारी॥
english: Holding a thousand lotus flowers; you then tested Ram, O Purari
roman: Sahas Kamal Mein Ho Rahe Dhari, Kinh Pariksha Tabhin Purari

hindi: एक कमल प्रभु राखेउ जोई। कमल नयन पूजन चहँ सोई॥
english: When one lotus was hidden by you; Ram offered his own lotus-eye in devotion
roman: Ek Kamal Prabhu Rakheu Joi, Kamal Nayan Poojan Chahan Soi

hindi: कठिन भक्ति देखी प्रभु शंकर। भए प्रसन्न दिए इच्छित वर॥
english: Seeing the intense devotion, Lord Shankara; was pleased and granted the desired boon
roman: Kathin Bhakti Dekhi Prabhu Shankar, Bhae Prasann Diye Ichchhit Var

hindi: जय जय जय अनंत अविनाशी। करत कृपा सब के घट वासी॥
english: Victory, victory, victory to the eternal and indestructible; showing mercy, dwelling in the heart of all
roman: Jai Jai Jai Anant Avinashi, Karat Kripa Sab Ke Ghat Vasi

hindi: दुष्ट सकल नित मोहि सतावै। भ्रमत रहे मोहि चैन न आवै॥
english: Wicked people constantly torment me; I wander restlessly, finding no peace
roman: Dusht Sakal Nit Mohi Satavai, Bhramat Rahe Mohi Chain Na Avai

hindi: त्राहि-त्राहि मैं नाथ पुकारो। यहि अवसर मोहि आन उबारो॥
english: I cry out "Save me, save me, O Lord"; at this moment please come and rescue me
roman: Trahi Trahi Main Nath Pukaro, Yahi Avasar Mohi An Ubaro

hindi: लै त्रिशूल शत्रुन को मारो। संकट से मोहि आन उबारो॥
english: Take up your trident and slay my enemies; come and deliver me from this crisis
roman: Lai Trishul Shatrun Ko Maro, Sankat Se Mohi An Ubaro

hindi: माता पिता भ्राता सब होई। संकट में पूछत नहिं कोई॥
english: Though I have mother, father and brothers; in crisis none inquires after me
roman: Mata Pita Bhrata Sab Hoi, Sankat Mein Puchhat Nahin Koi

hindi: स्वामी एक है आस तुम्हारी। आय हरहु अब संकट भारी॥
english: O Lord, my only hope is you; come now and remove this great difficulty
roman: Swami Ek Hai As Tumhari, Ay Harahu Ab Sankat Bhari

hindi: धन निर्धन को देत सदाहीं। जो कोई जाँचे सो फल पाहीं॥
english: You always give wealth to the poor; whoever seeks from you receives that fruit
roman: Dhan Nirdhan Ko Det Sadahin, Jo Koi Janche So Phal Pahin

hindi: अस्तुति केहि विधि करैं तुम्हारी। क्षमहु नाथ अब चूक हमारी॥
english: How should I praise you; forgive me Lord for my errors
roman: Astuti Kehi Vidhi Karain Tumhari, Kshamahu Nath Ab Chook Hamari

hindi: शंकर हो संकट के नाशन। मंगल कारण विघ्न विनाशन॥
english: O Shankara, you are the destroyer of troubles; cause of auspiciousness and destroyer of obstacles
roman: Shankar Ho Sankat Ke Nashan, Mangal Karan Vighna Vinashan

hindi: योगी यति मुनि ध्यान लगावैं। नारद शारद शीश नवावैं॥
english: Yogis, ascetics and sages meditate on you; Narada and Sharada bow their heads to you
roman: Yogi Yati Muni Dhyan Lagaven, Narad Sharad Shish Navayen

hindi: नमो नमो जय नमो शिवाय। सुर ब्रह्मादिक पार न पाय॥
english: Salutations, salutations, victory to Shiva; even Brahma and the gods cannot fathom your extent
roman: Namo Namo Jai Namo Shivaya, Sur Brahmaadik Par Na Paaya

hindi: जो यह पाठ करे मन लाई। ता पर होत है शम्भु सहाई॥
english: Whoever recites this with concentration; Shambhu (Shiva) becomes his helper
roman: Jo Yeh Path Kare Man Layi, Ta Par Hot Hai Shambhu Sahai

hindi: ऋनियां जो कोई हो अधिकारी। पाठ करे सो पावन हारी॥
english: If one is burdened by debt and wishes to be rid of it; reading this chalisa purifies and helps
roman: Riniya Jo Koi Ho Adhikari, Path Kare So Pavan Hari

hindi: पुत्र हीन कर इच्छा जोई। निश्चय शिव प्रसाद तेहि होई॥
english: Whoever is childless and has the desire for a son; by Shiva's grace that wish is certainly fulfilled
roman: Putra Hin Kar Ichhha Joi, Nishchay Shiv Prasad Tehi Hoi

hindi: पण्डित त्रयोदशी को लावे। ध्यान पूर्वक होम करावे॥
english: Invite a pandit on the thirteenth lunar day; and with full concentration perform the fire ritual
roman: Pandit Trayodashi Ko Lave, Dhyan Purvak Hom Karave

hindi: त्रयोदशी व्रत करै हमेशा। ता के तन नहिं रहे कलेशा॥
english: Whoever always observes the thirteenth-day fast; no affliction remains in his body
roman: Trayodashi Vrat Karai Hamesha, Ta Ke Tan Nahin Rahe Kalesha

hindi: धूप-दीप नैवेद्य चढ़ावे। शंकर सम्मुख पाठ सुनावे॥
english: Offer incense, lamp and food; read the chalisa in the presence of Lord Shankara
roman: Dhoop Deep Naivedya Chadhave, Shankar Sammukh Path Sunaave

hindi: जन्म-जन्म के पाप नसाबे। अंतवास शिवपुर में पाबे॥
english: Sins of all past births are destroyed; and in the end one attains abode in Shiva's realm
roman: Janm Janm Ke Pap Nasabe, Antvash Shivpur Mein Pabe

hindi: कहे हनुमान अब अधिकारी। जो शिव भक्त है हितकारी॥
english: Hanuman says, he is deserving; who is a devotee of Shiva and beneficial to all
roman: Kahe Hanuman Ab Adhikari, Jo Shiv Bhakt Hai Hitkari

hindi: कैलास राना शिव विराजे, करत सदा आनंद। पारवती के अर्द्धांग में, शोभित शिव नित मंद॥
english: Lord Shiva rules on Kailash, always in bliss; Parvati graces his left side, gentle and serene
roman: Kailas Rana Shiv Viraje, Karat Sada Anand, Parvati Ke Ardhang Mein, Shobhit Shiv Nit Mand
